name: Italian Sausage & Red Grapes
recipeInstructions:
1. Parboil the hot sausage for about 10 minutes.
2. Add the grapes and balsamic vinegar to an oval baking dish.
3. Place the sausages on top of the grapes.
4. Bake the dish at the highest oven setting for 8 minutes, then turn and bake for another 8 minutes.
5. After the sausage are browned, remove them.
6. Mash some of the grapes and heat with the pan juices until boiling.
7. Add the butter and whisk into a sauce.
8. Serve the sausages with the sauce and mashed potatoes.
